MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Continued To Dec-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Trial Short Cause on the Cross-Complaint.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Patrick R. Kitchin, Esq., appearing for Defendant and Cross-Complainant ANDREW KIM.
No appearance by or on behalf of Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant TONY LIMTIACO, doing business as INDUSTRIALISTS.
Defendant and Cross-Complainant Andrew Kim sworn and examined on his own behalf.
Cross-Complaiant's Exhibit 1. 1 Page document GMail dated Fri. Dec. 28, 2012 was marked for Identification and admitted in evidence.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Defndant and Cross-Complainant Andrew Kim and against Cross-Defendant Tony Limtiaco, doing business as Industrialists as follows:
Damages $10,697.56
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $480.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,697.56
Court ordered Exhibit 1 returned to counsel for the care and custody of the court.
Judgment signed in open court.

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ARLO H. SMITH, TEL. NO. 685-9331, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltfs Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS ANDREW KIM and AMFK INDUSTRIES' Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Complaint - The motion to strike is denied as to the prayer for punitive damages. Plaintiff pleads an intentional tort and that claim supports the prayer for punitive damages. The unopposed motion to strike the prayer for attorney's fees is granted without leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltfs Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ANDREW KIM & AMFK INDUSTRIES' Motion To Strike Portions Of plantiff's Complaint is continued to September 24, 2013, to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Please provide a courtesy copy of the moving and reply papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.
